name: Debadatta Dash
title: Co-Founder & Management Head
bio:
Mr. Debadatta Dash is a Electronics Engineer and a seasoned entrepreneur and proprietor of the Vigil brand, a successful company built from the ground up over 25+ years.  A pioneer in the service industry, he was instrumental in introducing CCTV  & other surveillance system in Odisha, leading projects ranging from domestic installations to large-scale government initiatives.

With Extensive experience in building and scaling businesses, he brings strong expertise in operations, services and growth.  Known for his keen understanding of people, he has identified the critical gap between an individual's task execution and their mental aptitude.

He now brings this insight and experience into the field of career counseling, contributing to the company's mission of helping individuals align their strengths with the right career path.
